name: CourseModuleSharingPlatform
description: Web app providing a basic platform for sharing and managing course modules, allowing users to upload, import, export, and search educational content.

name: LearnMaster
description: Learning platform that allows uploading of course modules with lecture notes and quizzes

name: CourseGeneratorAI
description: Use AI to generate interactive courses from lecture notes

name: EduHub Quest - v1 - beta
description: AI-powered study platform with achievements, leaderboards, and community sharing that makes learning fun. Transform your study materials into interactive AI-generated flashcards, quizzes, and notes while earning achievements and competing on global leaderboards (gamified learning).

name: FlashcardCreatorAI
description: Coming soon: Use AI to generate and use digital interactive flashcard to enhance memorization and learning
